nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Aplonis
nodes.summary: Aplonis（Aplonis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联20种鸟类，如Metallic starling、Yellow-eyed starling、Rennell starling等20种鸟类。

nodes.name: 巴布亚新几内亚
nodes.summary: 巴布亚新几内亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联71种鸟类，包括白腹麻鸭、Black-eared cuckoo、Shining bronze cuckoo等71种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Yellow-eyed starling
nodes.summary: The yellow-eyed starling (Aplonis mystacea) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in Indonesia and Papua New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The yellow-eyed starling (Aplonis mystacea) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in Indonesia and Papua New Guinea.
